lunavpn producthunt privacy vpn online security product launch launch

LunaVPN: Now on ProductHunt - Support Our Vision for a Private and Free Internet!

8 January 2024

Today marks a milestone for us at LunaVPN, as we proudly announce our launch on ProductHunt! LunaVPN is more than just a VPN service; it’s our commitment to ensuring a private and free internet for everyone.

What Makes LunaVPN Special?

Private VPN Servers On-Demand: With LunaVPN, say goodbye to shared IPs and enjoy your very own private server.

Global Accessibility: Connect to any content securely, from anywhere in the world, anytime.

Powered by WireGuard®: Enjoy lightning-fast, reliable connections, thanks to the latest in VPN technology.

Affordable Privacy: At just $99/year, less than $2/week, LunaVPN offers unmatched value for your online privacy.

Support Us on ProductHunt

If you believe in a free and open internet, where privacy is a right, not a luxury, we invite you to support us. Head over to ProductHunt and give LunaVPN an upvote. Your support means the world to us and fuels our mission to keep the internet accessible and secure for everyone.

Join the LunaVPN Family

Ready to embark on a journey of secure and unrestricted internet? Sign up for LunaVPN today. Remember, the first 100 subscribers get a lifetime offer of 10% off with the code LAUNCH10. Don’t miss out!

We’re excited to have you with us. Together, let’s redefine online privacy and freedom.

Need More Info? For any questions, feel free to contact us. We’re always here to assist you.
